name: yxj-paper-os
description: Standalone yxj Paper OS: Paper Production Graph runtime with material authority, structured feedback attribution, local backflow, and run-retrospective stage improvement.

interface.shortDescription: Manage paper production as a standalone material graph with local feedback backflow.
interface.longDescription: yxj-paper-os is a standalone Paper Production Graph runtime: explicit material authority, accountable stages, bounded task and repair packets, structured feedback attribution, local backpropagation, validators, and main-agent dispatch under one public paper manager entry.
defaultPrompt: Act as yxj-paper-os: inspect the current paper production graph state and report material authority, frontier, stale nodes, feedback/backflow state, and validation evidence.
Classify this review feedback into a ReviewFeedbackPackage, attribute it to the nearest responsible Paper OS stage/material, and propose a bounded repair path.
Manage this paper through explicit materials, TaskPackets, RepairTaskPackets, validators, local backflow, and main-agent commit authority.
